title: Bugalugs Dog Perfume Spray with Aloe Vera & Baby Powder Cologne great Pet Odour Eliminator Deodorant Spray for Smelly Dogs can use as Dry Shampoo
features: Long Lasting Baby Powder & Aloe Vera Fragrance dog dry shampoo - makes your smelly dog smell great! Bugalugs perfume spray helps your dog smell fabulous in between washes with a long-lasting freshness. For the ultimate grooming experience, complement your Bugalugs spray with our matching dog shampoo to leave your beloved canine companion looking and feeling their absolute best!

Refresh your dogs coat on the go! - Ideal for use after bath time, between baths, or on the go, our Bugalugs baby powder dog spray is travel friendly and great for popping in your bag or car. Dog deodorant spray is gentle on skin and packed with ingredients that hydrate and nourish the coat, with a long lasting scent, our fast-drying finishing dog perfume spray and dog scent spray pampers your pets coat and skin with a nurturing touch
25% Extra Free - more of the scent you love! Beloved by professional groomers, Bugalugs dry dog shampoo dog perfume are the go-to grooming products for dogs

Vegan Friendly & pH Balanced Formula - Bugalugs dog deodorant spray for smelly dogs is safe and effective for dogs of all breeds, including puppies over 8 weeks old. Our customer's love our 'baby smell spray' and professional dog groomers note that the scent lasts for days!

Trust in Bugalugs baby cologne dog fragrance spray to leave your pet smelling and feeling like they've just stepped out of a high-end salon!. Use alongside our other grooming products for dogs these include dog shampoo for smelly dogs, dog conditioner, puppy shampoo and dry shampoo for dogs
description: Product description Make your dog's grooming experience special with the calming and comforting scent of Bugalugs Baby Powder Dog Cologne Spray! Swiftly eliminate unwanted smelly odours in an instant and say hello to a fur-baby that exudes a luxurious salon-like fragrance that both dog owners and professional groomers love. Our innovative dual action formula not only refreshes and deodorises the coat in between washes, but our Bugalugs colognes & finishing sprays for dogs pampers your furry friend's coat and skin with a nurturing touch thanks to added Aloe Vera and Pro-Vitamin B5 (Panthenol). Enriched with these nourishing ingredients, Bugalugs Baby Powder Dog Spray Perfume and Dog Aftershave goes beyond just scent. Aloe Vera's soothing properties calm and comfort your pet's skin, while Pro-Vitamin B5 promotes a lustrous and healthy coat. Spray our dog Baby Powder Spray onto your four-legged friends dry coat after grooming or use our doggy deodorant spray in between washes to keep your dog's coat smelling great. Pair with our matching Baby Powder Shampoo for the ultimate luxury salon experience at home! Ingredients Aloe vera Directions Apply to your dog's coat after bath time, between baths, or on the go for a fresh scent. Can also be used after grooming or in between washes.
